Intergenerational Persistence in Child Mortality in Indonesia

title: Kazuya Masuda
text:
I am Associate Professor of Economics at Gakushuin University in Tokyo.
My research is in development economics, health economics, economic history, and intergenerational mobility.
kazuya.masuda@gakushuin.ac.jp
